description: Load the 'HAWT_Start.wpa' project from /home/ga/Documents/sample_projects/ and modify the blade geometry to introduce sweep and pre-bend. Set the tip section X-Offset (Sweep) to 2.0 m and the Y-Offset (Pre-bend) to 1.5 m. Save the modified project as /home/ga/Documents/projects/swept_blade.wpa and export the blade geometry as an STL file to /home/ga/Documents/projects/swept_blade.stl.
